steps.title: Read the target year
steps.content: For 2012/2013, Argentina's percentage decreased from the previous marketing year but still remained above Brazil and the United States. The completion must report both the decrease and the ranking.

steps.title: Reject graph mismatches
steps.content: A wrongly says Brazil increased and stayed below the United States. B wrongly says Brazil surpassed Argentina. D wrongly says the United States reached its highest point. The statement about Argentina matches the data. The answer is C.
